title: Job Openings at Beacongate Limited
content:
Beacongate Limited - The company is primarily set up to help transform the latent abilities and potentials of Entrepreneurs, Professionals and Executives and make them realize their full potentials as well as create leadership brands that would make them distinct. This involves using approaches that lead to self discovery, awareness of situations, empowering for positive actions and actualization of goals and visions. We offer customized solutions to meet your personal and business needs.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Civil Engineer

Job Location: Lagos

Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are seeking an experienced Civil Engineer (Road & Drainage) to lead and drainage construction projects. You will oversee project planning, execution, and supervision while ensuring quality, safety, and timely delivery.

Responsibilities


	Design and plan road, drainage, water collector, and culvert works.
	Manage planning, construction, and maintenance of civil infrastructure in line with safety and environmental standards.
	Supervise site teams, contractors, and project execution from drawings to completion.
	Prepare and review BOQs, budgets, schedules, and progress reports.
	Ensure projects are delivered within scope, time, and budget while maintaining structural integrity.
	Liaise with architects, surveyors, and other stakeholders to ensure smooth project execution.


Requirements


	Degree in Civil Engineering.
	1–5 years of experience in road and drainage construction.
	Proven track record in managing successful construction projects.
	Strong technical and project management skills.
	Ability to lead teams and coordinate with multiple stakeholders.


Application Closing Date: 25th March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Profiles to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

 

2.)  Sales / Business Development Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Industry: General Insurance

Job Summary


	We are urgently hiring an experienced Sales / Business Development Manager to drive revenue growth and expand our general insurance portfolio.
	The successful candidate will identify new business opportunities, manage corporate and broker relationships, and achieve premium income targets.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new business opportunities for general insurance products.
	Build and maintain relationships with corporate clients, brokers, and agents.
	Achieve sales and premium income targets.
	Prepare and present insurance proposals and negotiate terms with clients.
	Maintain strong client relationships to ensure policy renewals and retention.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Insurance, Finance, or related field.
	7–10 years of experience in insurance sales or business development, preferably in general insurance.
	Strong network within corporate and broker markets.
	Professional certifications (ACII, AIIN, CIIN) will be an added advantage.


Compensation & Benefits


	Very attractive salary package
	13th Month
	Health insurance (HMO)
	Pension contribution
	Professional development opportunities
	Leave Allowance.


Application Closing Date: 31st March, 2026.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

3.) Deputy Marketing Manager (General Insurance)


	drainage construction projects. You will oversee project planning, execution, and supervision while ensuring quality, safety, and timely delivery.


Responsibilities


	Design and plan road, drainage, water collector, and culvert works.
	Manage planning, construction, and maintenance of civil infrastructure in line with safety and environmental standards.
	Supervise site teams, contractors, and project execution from drawings to completion.
	Prepare and review BOQs, budgets, schedules, and progress reports.
	Ensure projects are delivered within scope, time, and budget while maintaining structural integrity.
	Liaise with architects, surveyors, and other stakeholders to ensure smooth project execution.


Requirements


	Degree in Civil Engineering.
	1–5 years of experience in road and drainage construction.
	Proven track record in managing successful construction projects.
	Strong technical and project management skills.
	Ability to lead teams and coordinate with multiple stakeholders.


Application Closing Date: 25th March, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Profiles to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Sales Executive",
  "description": "Transnet is a dynamic cloud-based technology company headquartered in Nigeria, specializing in providing innovative cloud solutions to help businesses optimize their IT infrastructure and accelerate their digital transformation. Leveraging the power of Amazon Web Services (AWS), Transnet offers a range of services that empower organizations to modernize their operations and stay competitive in a rapidly evolving digital landscape.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Sales Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly motivated and results-driven Senior Sales Executive to drive revenue growth, expand our customer base, and strengthen strategic partnerships.
	The ideal candidate will have strong experience in B2B sales, particularly in cloud services, IT solutions, or technology-driven environments.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement strategic sales plans to achieve company revenue targets.
	Identify, prospect, and close new business opportunities in target markets.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with corporate clients and key stakeholders.
	Present and demonstrate Transnet Cloud solutions to prospective clients.
	Negotiate contracts and close high-value deals.
	Collaborate with marketing and technical teams to align client needs with service offerings.
	Prepare sales forecasts, reports, and pipeline updates.
	Mentor and support junior sales team members where necessary.
	Stay updated on industry trends, competitor activities, and emerging technologies.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or related field.
	Minimum of 6 years of proven experience in sales, preferably in cloud computing, IT solutions selling or SaaS.
	Strong track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets.
	Excellent negotiation, communication, and presentation skills.
	Ability to manage large accounts and complex deals or sales cycles and a robust pipeline of enterprise relationship.
	Strong analytical and strategic thinking abilities.
	Proficiency in CRM tools and Microsoft Office Suite.


Key Competencies:


	Results-oriented and target-driven
	Strong relationship management skills
	Strategic thinking and problem-solving
	High level of professionalism and integrity
	Excellent time management and organizational skills.

Senior Sales Executive Job at Transnet




        
    

        
        Transnet is a dynamic cloud-based technology company headquartered in Nigeria, specializing in providing innovative cloud solutions to help businesses optimize their IT infrastructure and accelerate their digital transformation. Leveraging the power of Amazon Web Services (AWS), Transnet offers a range of services that empower organizations to modernize their operations and stay competitive in a rapidly evolving digital landscape.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Sales Executive

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly motivated and results-driven Senior Sales Executive to drive revenue growth, expand our customer base, and strengthen strategic partnerships.
	The ideal candidate will have strong experience in B2B sales, particularly in cloud services, IT solutions, or technology-driven environments.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement strategic sales plans to achieve company revenue targets.
	Identify, prospect, and close new business opportunities in target markets.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with corporate clients and key stakeholders.
	Present and demonstrate Transnet Cloud solutions to prospective clients.
	Negotiate contracts and close high-value deals.
	Collaborate with marketing and technical teams to align client needs with service offerings.
	Prepare sales forecasts, reports, and pipeline updates.
	Mentor and support junior sales team members where necessary.
	Stay updated on industry trends, competitor activities, and emerging technologies.


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or related field.
	Minimum of 6 years of proven experience in sales, preferably in cloud computing, IT solutions selling or SaaS.
	Strong track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets.
	Excellent negotiation, communication, and presentation skills.
	Ability to manage large accounts and complex deals or sales cycles and a robust pipeline of enterprise relationship.
	Strong analytical and strategic thinking abilities.
	Proficiency in CRM tools and Microsoft Office Suite.


Key Competencies:


	Results-oriented and target-driven
	Strong relationship management skills
	Strategic thinking and problem-solving
	High level of professionalism and integrity
	Excellent time management and organizational skills.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Chief Operating Officer",
  "description": "Open Hospital Limited, your health is our priority. Your comfort is our commitment. Quality Healthcare You Can Trust. Compassion You Can Feel. A privately owned healthcare facility under the Open Health Foundation, providing accessible, patient centered medical services for individuals and families in Abuja, Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Operating Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced and strategic Chief Operating Officer (COO) to oversee the day-to-day operations of our organization.
	The COO will work closely with the CEO and executive team to ensure operational efficiency, implement business strategies, and drive growth across all departments.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement operational strategies aligned with the company&rsquo;s goals and objectives.
	Oversee daily operations across all departments, ensuring efficiency and high performance.
	Manage budgets, resources, and operational planning to optimize productivity.
	Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) and operational metrics to drive improvements.
	Lead, mentor, and develop department heads and operational teams.
	Ensure compliance with company policies, industry regulations, and quality standards.
	Identify opportunities for process optimization, cost reduction, and innovation.
	Collaborate with the CEO and executive team on strategic decision-making.
	Report on operational performance and recommend solutions to enhance effectiveness.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Management, or a related field (MBA preferred).
	Proven experience in a senior operational leadership role.
	Strong strategic planning, problem-solving, and organizational skills.
	Excellent leadership and team management abilities.
	Knowledge of business operations, finance, and organizational processes.
	Ability to work under pressure and make high-level decisions.


Preferred Qualifications:


	1-2 years of experience in executive management roles.
	Experience in healthcare or hospital administration is an advantage.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

Chief Operating Officer Job at Open Hospital Limited




        
    

        
        Open Hospital Limited, your health is our priority. Your comfort is our commitment. Quality Healthcare You Can Trust. Compassion You Can Feel. A privately owned healthcare facility under the Open Health Foundation, providing accessible, patient centered medical services for individuals and families in Abuja, Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Operating Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced and strategic Chief Operating Officer (COO) to oversee the day-to-day operations of our organization.
	The COO will work closely with the CEO and executive team to ensure operational efficiency, implement business strategies, and drive growth across all departments.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement operational strategies aligned with the company’s goals and objectives.
	Oversee daily operations across all departments, ensuring efficiency and high performance.
	Manage budgets, resources, and operational planning to optimize productivity.
	Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) and operational metrics to drive improvements.
	Lead, mentor, and develop department heads and operational teams.
	Ensure compliance with company policies, industry regulations, and quality standards.
	Identify opportunities for process optimization, cost reduction, and innovation.
	Collaborate with the CEO and executive team on strategic decision-making.
	Report on operational performance and recommend solutions to enhance effectiveness.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Management, or a related field (MBA preferred).
	Proven experience in a senior operational leadership role.
	Strong strategic planning, problem-solving, and organizational skills.
	Excellent leadership and team management abilities.
	Knowledge of business operations, finance, and organizational processes.
	Ability to work under pressure and make high-level decisions.


Preferred Qualifications:


	1-2 years of experience in executive management roles.
	Experience in healthcare or hospital administration is an advantage.
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media & Digital Marketing Manager",
  "description": "The Lagos Chamber of Commerce and Industry (LCCI) is the leading private sector group in Nigeria, established to promote and protect trade and industry.Founded in 1888 and incorporated in 1950, it represents the interests of the business community in Lagos and beyond, advocating for policies that support trade, industry, commerce, and agriculture.The LCCI also provides business development services, training, and information to its members.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media &amp; Digital Marketing Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are is seeking a seasoned, resourceful, and results-driven Social Media &amp; Digital Marketing Manager to join its dynamic Trade Promotionteam.
	The successful candidate will play a pivotal role in the planning, promotion, and execution of the Lagos International Trade Fair (LITF), which is the largest international trade fair in Nigeria and one of the most prominent in Africa.
	The LITF is a flagship 10-day annual event, commencing on the first Friday of November, and serves as a premier platform for trade, investment, and business promotion.


Job Summary


	The Social Media &amp; Digital Marketing Manager will be responsible for developing, implementing, and managing innovative digital strategies to strengthen the Chambers online presence, promote trade initiatives, and effectively engage stakeholders both locally and internationally&mdash;aligned with LITF&#39;smission of advancing trade and economic development.


Key Responsibilities
Strategic Planning &amp; Execution:


	Develop and execute comprehensive digital marketing and social media strategies to enhance brand visibility and stakeholder engagement.
	Plan and deliver targeted campaigns for trade fairs, exhibitions, conferences, and other Chamber programmes.


Content Development:


	Create and curate high-quality, engaging, and audience-focused content (videos, graphics, articles, etc.) across digital platforms.
	Manage content calendars to ensure consistency, timeliness, and relevance.


Social Media Management:


	Manage and grow LITFpresence across platforms, including LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube.
	Monitor online conversations and drive meaningful engagement with stakeholders.
	Respond promptly to inquiries, feedback, and comments.


Analytics &amp; Reporting:


	Track, analyse, and report on key digital performance metrics (reach, impressions, engagement, conversions).
	Provide monthly performance reports with actionable insights and recommendations.


Campaign Management &amp; Event Promotion:


	Plan and execute integrated digital campaigns (paid and organic), including social media ads, Google Ads, and email marketing.
	Leverage digital tools to drive participation in trade events and programmes.
	Provide real-time social media coverage during events and produce post-event highlights.
	Optimise campaigns for maximum return on investment (ROI) and manage budgets effectively.


SEO &amp; Website Coordination:


	Collaborate with the web team to ensure the website is updated, user-friendly, and SEO-optimised.
	Publish trade-related content to improve search engine rankings and visibility.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
Engagement Growth:


	Increase follower base by 50&ndash;60% annually
	Improve engagement rate by 30&ndash;35% quarterly


Content Performance:


	Publish a minimum of 4&ndash;5 high-quality posts weekly
	Achieve at least a 15% increase in content impressions per campaign


Lead Generation &amp; Conversion:


	Generate qualified leads for trade events through digital channels
	Drive a minimum 25% increase in event registrations and attendance


Website &amp; SEO Performance:


	Increase website traffic by 30&ndash;40%
	Improve rankings for relevant trade and business keywords


Campaign ROI:


	Meet or exceed ROI targets for paid campaigns


Reporting &amp; Insights:


	Deliver accurate monthly performance reports with strategic recommendations


Brand Reputation Management:


	Maintain response time within 24 hours across platforms
	Sustain a positive sentiment rate above 85%


Event Visibility:


	Achieve at least a 75% increase in social media mentions and digital visibility during events


Skills &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Marketing, Social Sciences, or related field; relevant professional certification in Digital Marketing is an added advantage.
	5&ndash;7 years of experience** in digital marketing.
	Proven track record of delivering successful digital campaigns and measurable results.
	Strong knowledge of digital marketing tools and platforms (e.g., Google Analytics 4, Google Ads, Adobe Marketing Cloud, HubSpot).
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and stakeholder engagement skills.
	Strong analytical, reporting, and problem-solving abilities.
	Ability to work within organisational policies and procedures with a high level of professionalism.


Equal Employment Opportunity:


	The Lagos Chamber of Commerce and Industry is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, age, religion, gender, marital status, disability, or any other protected status.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter to:&nbsp;recruitment@lagoschamber.com&nbsp;using &quot;Social Media &amp; Digital Marketing Manager&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Social Media & Digital Marketing Manager Job at  Lagos Chamber of Commerce and Industry (LCCI)




        
    

        
        The Lagos Chamber of Commerce and Industry (LCCI) is the leading private sector group in Nigeria, established to promote and protect trade and industry.Founded in 1888 and incorporated in 1950, it represents the interests of the business community in Lagos and beyond, advocating for policies that support trade, industry, commerce, and agriculture.The LCCI also provides business development services, training, and information to its members.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media & Digital Marketing Manager

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are is seeking a seasoned, resourceful, and results-driven Social Media & Digital Marketing Manager to join its dynamic Trade Promotionteam.
	The successful candidate will play a pivotal role in the planning, promotion, and execution of the Lagos International Trade Fair (LITF), which is the largest international trade fair in Nigeria and one of the most prominent in Africa.
	The LITF is a flagship 10-day annual event, commencing on the first Friday of November, and serves as a premier platform for trade, investment, and business promotion.


Job Summary


	The Social Media & Digital Marketing Manager will be responsible for developing, implementing, and managing innovative digital strategies to strengthen the Chambers online presence, promote trade initiatives, and effectively engage stakeholders both locally and internationally—aligned with LITF'smission of advancing trade and economic development.


Key Responsibilities
Strategic Planning & Execution:


	Develop and execute comprehensive digital marketing and social media strategies to enhance brand visibility and stakeholder engagement.
	Plan and deliver targeted campaigns for trade fairs, exhibitions, conferences, and other Chamber programmes.


Content Development:


	Create and curate high-quality, engaging, and audience-focused content (videos, graphics, articles, etc.) across digital platforms.
	Manage content calendars to ensure consistency, timeliness, and relevance.


Social Media Management:


	Manage and grow LITFpresence across platforms, including LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube.
	Monitor online conversations and drive meaningful engagement with stakeholders.
	Respond promptly to inquiries, feedback, and comments.


Analytics & Reporting:


	Track, analyse, and report on key digital performance metrics (reach, impressions, engagement, conversions).
	Provide monthly performance reports with actionable insights and recommendations.


Campaign Management & Event Promotion:


	Plan and execute integrated digital campaigns (paid and organic), including social media ads, Google Ads, and email marketing.
	Leverage digital tools to drive participation in trade events and programmes.
	Provide real-time social media coverage during events and produce post-event highlights.
	Optimise campaigns for maximum return on investment (ROI) and manage budgets effectively.


SEO & Website Coordination:


	Collaborate with the web team to ensure the website is updated, user-friendly, and SEO-optimised.
	Publish trade-related content to improve search engine rankings and visibility.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)
Engagement Growth:


	Increase follower base by 50–60% annually
	Improve engagement rate by 30–35% quarterly


Content Performance:


	Publish a minimum of 4–5 high-quality posts weekly
	Achieve at least a 15% increase in content impressions per campaign


Lead Generation & Conversion:


	Generate qualified leads for trade events through digital channels
	Drive a minimum 25% increase in event registrations and attendance


Website & SEO Performance:


	Increase website traffic by 30–40%
	Improve rankings for relevant trade and business keywords


Campaign ROI:


	Meet or exceed ROI targets for paid campaigns


Reporting & Insights:


	Deliver accurate monthly performance reports with strategic recommendations


Brand Reputation Management:


	Maintain response time within 24 hours across platforms
	Sustain a positive sentiment rate above 85%


Event Visibility:


	Achieve at least a 75% increase in social media mentions and digital visibility during events


Skills & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Social Sciences, or related field; relevant professional certification in Digital Marketing is an added advantage.
	5–7 years of experience** in digital marketing.
	Proven track record of delivering successful digital campaigns and measurable results.
	Strong knowledge of digital marketing tools and platforms (e.g., Google Analytics 4, Google Ads, Adobe Marketing Cloud, HubSpot).
	Excellent communication, interpersonal, and stakeholder engagement skills.
	Strong analytical, reporting, and problem-solving abilities.
	Ability to work within organisational policies and procedures with a high level of professionalism.


Equal Employment Opportunity:


	The Lagos Chamber of Commerce and Industry is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate based on race, ethnicity, age, religion, gender, marital status, disability, or any other protected status.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter to: [email protected] using "Social Media & Digital Marketing Manager" as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Customer Service Officer",
  "description": "Consulting DCC is a professional consulting firm that provides strategic, operational, recruitment, and advisory services designed to support business growth and improve organizational efficiency. We work closely with clients to understand their unique needs, address operational challenges, and deliver practical, results-driven solutions. Our approach is rooted in professionalism, integrity, and a strong understanding of business processes, enabling us to help organizations strengthen their structures, attract and retain the right talent, make informed decisions, and achieve sustainable performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Officer

Job Locations:&nbsp;Uyo - Akwa Ibom &amp; Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for smart, energetic, and sales-driven individuals to join our Outlet Sales/Operations team as&nbsp;Customer Service Officers.


Key Responsibilities


	Attend to walk-in customers and provide excellent service
	Drive sales and upsell products
	Handle customer inquiries, complaints, and feedback professionally
	Ensure proper display and presentation of products
	Support daily outlet operations and maintain cleanliness standards
	Work collaboratively with team members to achieve sales targets.


Requirements


	Minimum of a Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree (B.Sc./HND)
	Must have completed NYSC or exempted
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Sales-driven with a passion for customer satisfaction
	Smart, presentable, and proactive
	Willingness to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment
	Ability to workshifts, including weekends and public holidays.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;career@consultingdcc.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position and Location with where you reside (e.g&nbsp;&ldquo;Customer Service Officer &ndash; Uyo, Oron Road&rdquo;) as the subject of the email.",

Customer Service Officer Job at Consulting DCC




        
    

        
        Consulting DCC is a professional consulting firm that provides strategic, operational, recruitment, and advisory services designed to support business growth and improve organizational efficiency. We work closely with clients to understand their unique needs, address operational challenges, and deliver practical, results-driven solutions. Our approach is rooted in professionalism, integrity, and a strong understanding of business processes, enabling us to help organizations strengthen their structures, attract and retain the right talent, make informed decisions, and achieve sustainable performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Service Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Locations: Uyo - Akwa Ibom & Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are looking for smart, energetic, and sales-driven individuals to join our Outlet Sales/Operations team as Customer Service Officers.


Key Responsibilities


	Attend to walk-in customers and provide excellent service
	Drive sales and upsell products
	Handle customer inquiries, complaints, and feedback professionally
	Ensure proper display and presentation of products
	Support daily outlet operations and maintain cleanliness standards
	Work collaboratively with team members to achieve sales targets.


Requirements


	Minimum of a Bachelor’s Degree (B.Sc./HND)
	Must have completed NYSC or exempted
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Sales-driven with a passion for customer satisfaction
	Smart, presentable, and proactive
	Willingness to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment
	Ability to workshifts, including weekends and public holidays.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location with where you reside (e.g “Customer Service Officer – Uyo, Oron Road”) as the subject of the email.
